action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 10 ran a smoke test successfully (460m on one room map) but evaluation was never submitted. The current best score remains 0.6118 from iteration 7. The predict.py visible in context is truncated, so I must rewrite it completely to ensure robustness. Analysis: I need a crash-free predict.py that handles eval configs without an 'episodes' key by scanning maps_eval/, implements the directional-utility Dijkstra heuristic (utility/(dist+3.6), visited penalty 0.2, history penalty 0.65, anti-backtracking, step-budget guard), and outputs the exact required JSON. I also need to submit evaluation immediately to measure score and iteration time. Decision: Rewrite predict.py and smoke_test.py, run a quick smoke test, then submit eval with the dummy checkpoint.
